examples: We organize this part as a sequence of repair choices
rules.rewrite_direction: Delete the deck-management narration and replace it with the actual content claim.

examples: not as a list of unrelated papers
rules.rewrite_direction: Delete the empty contrast and state the real distinction directly.

examples: First -- Can domain randomization already make policies transferable before deployment?
Then -- Can calibration make the simulator closer to reality?
Finally -- Can online adaptation continue transfer on the robot?
rules.rewrite_direction: Remove ordering scaffolds such as First/Then/Finally and title the step directly.
